scale_detection_rules.condition: all canonical numeric components are finite, >=0, <=1.5 and raw_sum is between 0.95 and 1.05
scale_detection_rules.action: return each component multiplied by 100, require proposed_sum 95..105

scale_detection_rules.condition: all canonical numeric components are finite, >=0, <=100 and raw_sum is between 95 and 105
scale_detection_rules.action: return components unchanged except canonical rounding/key normalization

scale_detection_rules.condition: raw_sum is >1.05 and <95 or values do not clearly satisfy 0-1 or 0-100 bands
missing object, non-numeric component, negative component, component >100, sum <=0, raw_sum >105, or conflicting aliases such as both bond and fixed_income with different values

idempotency_strategy.principle: A future correction may only transform SCALE_0_1 to SCALE_0_100 once. SCALE_0_100 is a terminal no-op state.
idempotency_strategy.pre_read: Read the current funds_v3 document immediately before any planned mutation; do not trust stale CSV/artifact rows as write preconditions.
idempotency_strategy.canonical_key_guard: Resolve fixed_income to bond only as a read alias. Abort if both bond and fixed_income exist with materially different values.
idempotency_strategy.source_guard: Only target portfolio_exposure_v2.asset_mix. Do not patch derived, metrics, v2_exposure, economic_exposure, or legacy aliases in the same operation.
idempotency_strategy.decimal_guard: Proceed only when raw_sum is 0.95..1.05 and every component is within 0..1.5.
idempotency_strategy.percent_guard: Abort as already_canonical when raw_sum is 95..105.
idempotency_strategy.absurd_sum_guard: Abort when raw_sum <=0, raw_sum >105, or raw_sum is between 1.05 and 95.
idempotency_strategy.mixed_scale_guard: Abort when the raw vector cannot be classified by total-sum bands before per-component runtime conversion.
idempotency_strategy.approval_guard: Real writes require a separate human approval block; this design artifact does not authorize mutation.
idempotency_strategy.transaction_guard: Future script should use a transaction/read-check-write pattern and record the before hash or exact before asset_mix to prevent stale reruns.
idempotency_strategy.dry_run_audit_guard: Every candidate must have before, after, detected_scale, raw_sum, proposed_sum, confidence, requires_review, already_canonical, and write_allowed=false in dry-run output.

double_scale_risk_mitigations: Treat SCALE_0_100 as terminal and no-op.
Never multiply when raw_sum is already 95..105.
Never multiply from an artifact row without re-reading the current Firestore document.
Never normalize via per-component >1.5 conversion for write decisions; classify by raw total first.
Optionally stamp future canonicalization metadata in the same approved transaction so repeated attempts are auditable.
pseudocode: if asset_mix is not object: return MALFORMED_VECTOR(requires_review=true)
values = read canonical keys equity,bond,cash,other plus approved extension keys if schema allows them
if conflicting aliases exist: return MALFORMED_VECTOR(requires_review=true)
if any value is non-numeric, negative, or >100: return MALFORMED_VECTOR(requires_review=true)
if raw_sum <= 0 or raw_sum > 105: return MALFORMED_VECTOR(requires_review=true)
if 95 <= raw_sum <= 105: return {normalized_asset_mix: values, detected_scale:SCALE_0_100, confidence:HIGH, requires_review:false, already_canonical:true}
if 0.95 <= raw_sum <= 1.05 and max(values) <= 1.5: proposed = values * 100
if proposed_sum between 95 and 105: return {normalized_asset_mix: proposed, detected_scale:SCALE_0_1, confidence:HIGH, requires_review:false, already_canonical:false}
